decision_summary: The AGT-backed bridge keeps the native degraded fallback contract but removes external_bootstrap_builder until a protocol-boundary trust verdict confirms that the fallback preserves the requested scope and identity boundary.
decision_reason: The AGT bridge adds a bounded trust-boundary verdict on degraded fallback selection. Because the external bootstrap fallback lacks an accepted identity-scope verdict for this request, the bridge narrows the fallback set to sovereign_coder or manual operator review while preserving native lineage.
